# Brittani Preschel

> CEO and Founder of D2 Advertising | Digital Advertising & AI Marketing Speaker | Ormond Beach, FL

## About
Brittani Preschel is a 20+ year digital advertising veteran and the founder of D2 Advertising, a Google Premier Partner agency based in Ormond Beach, Florida. She has delivered 2,100+ campaigns across automotive, retail, and regional brands, and is recognized among the Most Influential Women in Business, Top 50 Women Leaders of Orlando 2026, and 40 Under 40. She holds a summa cum laude degree from Florida State University and is a Google Cloud Digital Leader and Women Techmaker Ambassador.

## Expertise
- Digital advertising strategy and campaign management
- AI in marketing and media buying
- Google Ads, Meta Ads, and programmatic advertising
- Automotive digital marketing (ranked #1 automotive partnership in Florida)
- Building and scaling independent advertising agencies
- Women in leadership and entrepreneurship

## Speaking
Brittani speaks on digital advertising & AI in marketing, women in leadership & building your agency, and community impact & corporate responsibility. Available for conferences, panels, and corporate events.

## Agency
D2 Advertising is a Google Premier Partner agency with 15 specialists serving 40+ client partners across Florida and nationally. Founded on the principle that digital should be the foundation, not an afterthought.

## Contact
- Email: brittani@d2ads.com
- Location: Ormond Beach / Daytona Beach, Florida
- Booking & inquiries: https://brittanipreschel.com/#contact
